info.title: NEUS Network — Public Integrator API
info.description:
Public integrator surface for NEUS.

This spec is generated from the running Express routes and explicit public operation metadata.

Note: Some verifiers require pro access. Admin-only capabilities are excluded from this spec.

chainId.description: Optional. For EVM (0x address), verification requests are normalized to the protocol hub chain. For non-EVM, include chain (CAIP-2) instead.

chain.description: Optional. For EVM (0x address), verification requests are normalized to protocol hub chain context. For non-EVM, include chain (e.g. solana:mainnet).

walletAddress.description: Signer wallet address (who authenticates the request)

subjectWallet.description: Optional: Wallet being verified (delegated subject). Must match signed payload for verifiers that support delegated subjects (allowsDelegatedSubject: true). Defaults to walletAddress if omitted. Only valid when all verifiers in verifierIds support allowsDelegatedSubject: true.

signature.description: Required unless authenticated session is present

signedTimestamp.description: Required unless authenticated session is present

chainId.description: Optional. For EVM (0x address), verification requests are normalized to the protocol hub chain. For non-EVM, include chain (CAIP-2) instead.

chain.description: Optional. For EVM (0x address), verification requests are normalized to protocol hub chain context. For non-EVM, include chain (e.g. solana:mainnet).

contentHash.description: Pre-computed verifier content hash (32-byte hex). Treated as the canonical verifierContentHash for ownership-basic; if content is also provided, the verifier integrity-checks that they match.

owner.description: Owner identifier (must match request walletAddress). Supports EVM (0x..), Solana (base58), NEAR (account IDs), and other universal address formats depending on chain context.

get.description: Returns a list of all supported verifier IDs, full verifier metadata (schemas + flow/access semantics), and the backend chain configuration (hub chain, asset allowlists).

get.summary: Get proofs by wallet or DID

schema.description: Filter proofs by chain ID (e.g., 84532 for Base Sepolia)
CAIP-2 chain reference for non-EVM signature verification (e.g. solana:mainnet)
Signature method hint for non-EVM signatures (e.g. ed25519)
CAIP-2 chain reference for non-EVM signature verification (e.g. solana:mainnet)
Signature method hint for non-EVM signatures (e.g. ed25519)

get.summary: Get pricing information for all payment types
